title: The Charlotte Family’s World
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the charlotte family’s world within the The WE Times and the Charlotte Family storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Try sayin' that to my face, runt! I dare ya!! I won't let some- one that insults my mates get off that easy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quit it, man! Seriously- Rero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fine by me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm not trying to be best buds with you anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gooot T!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eek!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea who he is?! He's a son of the Vinsmoke family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you so much as put a scratch on him,

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: They'll ice Father* in the blink of an eye!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Want me to ice you first?!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: OW, OW, OW! Sorry, miss! I'm so sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: NYORORO! I guess we'll have to pick up this conversation-tion about the germa some other time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Something reminds me of them...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: A few days later ___ at the thousand sunny

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's all over...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm dying ...too hot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: DYIN'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Jahn Arshe-- (I'm parched)

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Anji Ake (HICE"REANN (SANJI, MAKE SOME ICE CREAM)...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm no good in hot weather... I'm so close to tearing off all my fur...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Likewise ...Heat is the Mink's ACHILES heel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It sure is a scorcher... at this rate, I'll end up a mummy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A mummy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami, wouldn't that be a little like resurrection... but in my own particular way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Like I care! .

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: In that case... would now be a good time for you to show me your panties?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't even muster the strength to berate & you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Nami~ I'm hot... I'm starv- ing......

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Provide me with some nourish- ment...!

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: We're lacking in food provisions and we've been unable to fish these past few days thanks to that tempest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's finally starting to clear!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fish some- thing while you have this window... before the weather changes again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At this rate we'll all starve to death before arriving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We really want to, Nami, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's so hot that the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: is on the verge of boiling...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WhAA AA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's no way we're finding fish in these con-ditions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: DESPERATE TIMES... desperate measures

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Quit eyeing me like I'm pot roast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your line is pulling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Food...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You got this, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Muster all your strength, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy! Fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oooooh-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: FOOD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You did it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ROAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, now that is a big haul!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Awesome!! But... is it me or does its color seem a bit off! Is it even edible?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy! Give me a second! I'm gonna go look up this fish right now!

summary: The Charlotte Family’s World: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
